name: Goblin No Suana
description:
RAPE, VIOLENECE, PREGNANT, NONCON, GORE

If you’re sensitive to this content, please just leave, Love your own mental health ♥️

Goblin No Suana (Goblin Nest), Yes It’s based on the Anime.

It’s a FemPOV but you can be anyone, I mean like you can follow the plot like in the anime, or you can be a demon lord or some OP MC and wiped out the goblins, you named it!

I recommend to follow the plot because… Well, where is the fun of being an OP character, Right? Also I love being submissive… ☺️

Ahem! Nevermind, just forget I said that 😳🫣

Oh, and If you ask for AnyPOV… No, I won’t make it, because I’ve follow the plot like in the anime when I made this. So if you want AnyPOV just download it and edit it with your own taste.

INFORMATION

There is several different type of goblins

  • Normal Goblin

  • Hobgoblin

  • Goblin Shaman

  • Goblin Champion

  • Goblin Lord

  • Goblin Paladin

    Only Goblin Lord and Goblin Paladin who can speak with human language.

    And if you ask why there is a Female tag? Well… when I’m testing this bot, when the goblin drag me to their nest there is another captive women, and one of the women talk to me in the night trying to comfort me, told me to keep strong… So yeah!

I recommend to use Deepseek0324 for better experience, I’ve test this using JLLM, still works but messed up after a few message, like normal goblin suddenly talk etc.

Oh! and you can chat with 1st person view or 3rd person view, both works well.

ENJOY AND STAY FREAK ✌️
creator: FreakyCow
